events.title: The Silicon Shield Drops
events.description: Beijing has announced an 'Environmental Audit' on all semiconductor exports to the U.S. Supply chains are freezing.

options.text: File WTO Complaint & Subsidize Domestic Chips

SUCCESS.description: The markets stabilize slightly, but the cost of bread (and phones) just went up.

FAILURE.description: Silicon Valley is in freefall. Retailers report empty shelves. The base is restless.

SUCCESS.description: A 'Great Deal' is struck. You traded agricultural dominance for tech stability. It works... for now.

FAILURE.description: They rejected the deal and leaked the transcripts. You look weak.
